items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
❤️【Lady Dior My ABC】'Black Patent'
/4-Compartment Lambskin/
This handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty.
Exquisitely crafted from lambskin with a signature herringbone stitching and quilted details, this classic design is timeless.
Adorned with tonal enamel, lined with suede, and equipped with a chain shoulder strap and a zip pocket inside.
Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 20 x 8.5 x 17 cm
Model: 0538

【New Coconut Tree Apricot❤ Medium】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior's aesthetic. It holds daily essentials and features a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.

Size: 36×28 cm

items.name_cn:
High Version
#D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag 'Black Houndstooth'
This D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag is a new addition to the 2025 Spring-Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, offering a modern silhouette that enriches the D-Vibe line. Crafted with care from materials like black houndstooth, it is decorated with a white trellis pattern and accented with smooth black calfskin details. A practical style with a slip pocket for easy storage of daily essentials, featuring a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Zip closure
1 compartment
Internal slip pocket
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 2388
Dimensions: 20.5 x 13 x 5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick
